scenes.headline: RM200/month from birth.
scenes.body: What it actually buys your child by age 18.

scenes.headline: Year 5: ~RM15K
scenes.body: Five years of compounding. The base is starting to do the work.

scenes.headline: Year 10: ~RM38K
scenes.body: Now the gains-on-gains start to matter more than the contributions.

scenes.headline: Year 18: ~RM100K
scenes.body: Enough to fund a local degree. RM200 a month did the work.

scenes.headline: Start at age 5 → ~RM57K
scenes.body: Same RM200/month. Same return assumption. Five years late = roughly half the result. Time is the engine.

thumbnailBrief: Calm reassurance / education tone. Teal-light background as a cohesive series. Each card shows one year-anchor + one number. Card 1 is the hook setup; cards 2-4 build the curve; card 5 is the cautionary contrast. Numbers in orange (the 'wins'); navy headlines; muted grey for time labels. Logo + position indicator (1/5, 2/5, etc.) on every card.
